name: Google Cloud Translation API
what_it_does: Google Cloud's machine translation API supporting 130+ languages, available as both a basic REST API and an advanced neural model with glossary and batch support.
use_cases: Translating content to/from the widest possible range of languages
Batch document translation with formatting preservation
Glossary-based domain-specific translation for technical content
not_for: Applications where translation quality is paramount (DeepL beats Google on European pairs)
Projects without GCP account setup (requires Google Cloud billing)
best_when: You need maximum language coverage (130+) or are already in the Google Cloud ecosystem.
avoid_when: You need highest quality European language translation or want to avoid GCP billing complexity.

auth.notes: API key works for basic tier. Advanced tier and batch translation require service account or OAuth2. GCP IAM roles control permissions. Agents should use service accounts with minimum necessary permissions.

pricing.paid_tiers: $20 per 1M characters for Basic; $80 per 1M for Advanced
pricing.notes: Credit card required to enable billing on GCP, even for free tier. Character count is per API call including spaces.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors follow Google API error format with code, message, and status. Sometimes verbose but generally informative.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Translation is stateless and deterministic - same input returns same output.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires GCP project setup and billing enablement even for free tier - not quick to prototype with
Basic and Advanced models have different API endpoints and different pricing
Service account JSON key files must be managed securely - easy to accidentally expose
Quota increases require manual request to Google Cloud support
Language codes use BCP-47 format which differs from ISO 639-1 in some cases (e.g., 'zh-CN' not 'zh')

security_score_components.security_notes: Google Cloud IAM + API key. Service account for automated translation. SOC2, ISO27001. Text sent for translation — PII considerations if translating user data. Free tier: 500K chars/month.
